news.t: Dual Commencement: The Russell Index Shift to Semi-Annual Rebalancing
Volatile Market Conditions Could Drive Investors to Trade
Small-Cap Bear ETFs Awaken From Hibernation
3 ETFs That Rise as Small Caps Fall

holdings.infoBox: TZA is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Small Cap Bear 3X ETF (TZA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund provides -3x leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap companies. TZA was launched on Nov 5, 2008 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Dual Commencement: The Russell Index Shift to Semi-Annual Rebalancing
data.text: June is typically reserved for graduation processionals, with the “Pomp and Circumstance March No. 1 in D” blaring from PA systems or high-fidelity systems (depending on how well-funded the school is)...

data.title: Volatile Market Conditions Could Drive Investors to Trade
data.text: The curious investor will naturally want to know what could be done if stocks start trending downward more persistently.

data.title: Small-Cap Bear ETFs Awaken From Hibernation
data.text: Traders can position for further small-cap declines with these inverse ETFs that move in the opposite direction to the Russell 2000.

data.title: 3 ETFs That Rise as Small Caps Fall
data.text: The Russell 2000 tends to underperform during times of economic uncertainty. Explore these trading ideas using inverse small-cap ETFs.
